name: Kindergarten Learning Commons — Semester 2
description: An 18-week, play-based Kindergarten pathway for finding, making, sharing, and improving work with feedback. Lessons are brief, hands-on, flexible, and designed for adult-guided learning.
learningGoals: Build confidence and curiosity with finding, making, sharing, and improving work with feedback.
Communicate learning through talk, drawing, movement, play, or a simple creation.
Practice safe, kind, and responsible participation.

lessons.title: Notice and talk: finding, making, sharing, and improving work with feedback
lessons.objective: I can notice details and share a question about finding, making, sharing, and improving work with feedback through a close look at finding, making, sharing, and improving work with feedback.

lessons.title: Try it together: finding, making, sharing, and improving work with feedback
lessons.objective: I can notice details and share a question about finding, making, sharing, and improving work with feedback through a guided practice with finding, making, sharing, and improving work with feedback.

lessons.title: Make or show: finding, making, sharing, and improving work with feedback
lessons.objective: I can notice details and share a question about finding, making, sharing, and improving work with feedback through a small creation or demonstration about finding, making, sharing, and improving work with feedback.

units.title: Wonder and notice: finding, making, sharing, and improving work with feedback
units.essentialQuestion: What can we notice and wonder about finding, making, sharing, and improving work with feedback?
outcomes: I can notice details and share a question about finding, making, sharing, and improving work with feedback.
I can use words, pictures, movement, or materials to communicate my thinking.

lessons.title: Notice and talk: finding, making, sharing, and improving work with feedback
lessons.objective: I can notice details and share a question about finding, making, sharing, and improving work with feedback through a close look at finding, making, sharing, and improving work with feedback.

activities.title: A close look at finding, making, sharing, and improving work with feedback
activities.learnerAction: With an adult or teacher nearby when needed, the learner participates in a close look at finding, making, sharing, and improving work with feedback, uses words, pictures, movement, or materials to communicate thinking, and cleans up safely.

successCriteria: The learner participates safely and respectfully in finding, making, sharing, and improving work with feedback.
The learner communicates one observation, choice, or question using speech, drawing, movement, or a supported response.
